---
title: "The Cloud Performance Map: How Hetzner Ranks Among 5,000 Instance Types"
author: Gergely Daroczi
date: "2026-09-17"
conference: "Hetzner Summit"
conference_url: "https://www.hetzner.com/hetzner-summit"
location: "Falkenstein, Germany"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [black, css/custom-4.2.1.css]
    controls: true
    navigation-mode: vertical
    controls-layout: bottom-right
    controls-tutorial: true
    menu: false
    logo: images/sc-square-dark-300x300.jpg
    margin: 0.1
    height: 700
    width: 1150
    # width: 1244  # was used at revealjs 3.x
    center-title-slide: false
    slide-number: true
    transition: slide
    hash-type: title
    code-copy: false
    code-line-numbers: false
    highlight-style: arrow-dark
  gfm:
    mermaid-format: svg
    theme: neutral
---
